title: Add PollWithPending rejection and update tests for single-generation runtime binding
description: Define new RplRuntimeActionError::PollWithPending variant. Update all poll/complete paths to propagate rejection. Revise lichen-node tests (runtime, DAO vectors, secure_rpl) to exercise new rejection semantics, generation monotonicity, and no-stale-poll guarantees. Ensure no-std, clippy, and fake-clock tests pass.
